situation: A web designer receives a lawsuit or cease and desist letter for copyright infringement

options.action: Remove the infringing material and settle the lawsuit
options.consequence: Financial losses and potential damage to reputation

options.action: Fight the lawsuit and claim fair use
options.consequence: High legal costs and potential damage to reputation

common_rookie_mistake: Ignoring the lawsuit or cease and desist letter
consequence_if_wrong: Increased legal costs and potential damage to reputation
rationale: Removing the infringing material and settling the lawsuit is often the most cost-effective and reputation-saving option

situation: A web designer's unique content has been stolen and used by a competitor

options.action: Send a cease and desist letter to the competitor
options.consequence: Potential resolution of the issue without legal action

options.action: Sue the competitor for copyright infringement
options.consequence: High legal costs and potential damage to reputation

common_rookie_mistake: Not taking action to protect intellectual property
consequence_if_wrong: Loss of unique content and potential damage to reputation
rationale: Sending a cease and desist letter is often the most effective and cost-efficient way to resolve the issue
